page.title: Collect effortlessly, reduce your delinquency
page.subtitle: Automate recurring collections, register payments from multiple channels, and have full visibility of your portfolio. Reduce delinquency by up to 40%.

recurringCollections.title: Recurring collections
recurringCollections.description: Configure automatic monthly billing. Clients receive notifications and their payment is registered without manual intervention.

multipleChannels.title: Multiple channels
multipleChannels.description: Accept payments via bank transfer, Nequi, Mercado Pago, PSE, or cash. Everything recorded in one place.

delinquencyControl.title: Delinquency control
delinquencyControl.description: Identify overdue clients, schedule automatic reminders, and generate past-due portfolio reports.

reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
reconciliation.description: Automatically reconcile payments with generated invoices. No duplicate records or manual errors.
